Reading your photo...

Before we scan

This photo is sent to Anthropic's Claude AI to read it

FoodGuard sends only the photo you choose to Claude, so it can identify the food and read any ingredients list. Nothing else about you or your family is shared.

You'll only see this message once. You can still use barcode scanning and manual ingredient checking without sending anything to an outside AI.

FoodGuard is an informational tool only. Always read food labels yourself if you have a severe allergy. If in doubt, do not consume the product.

FoodGuard

Understanding Your Allergy

Most people know what they are allergic to. Very few know what it actually contains — and that gap can be dangerous.

When a doctor tells you that you have a milk allergy, most people think — fine, I will avoid milk. But milk is made up of many different proteins and sugars. You might react to just one of them. And that one component can hide in hundreds of products under names you would never recognise.

Important: This information is to help you understand your allergy and read food labels more confidently. It is not medical advice. Always consult your GP or allergy specialist. If you have been prescribed an EpiPen — carry it every single day without exception.

Simple honest pricing
Try everything free for 7 days — no card needed.
7 Day Free Trial

Full access to everything — no card required. Cancel any time.

Get help and support

Trusted UK organisations that can help you and your family manage allergies safely.
Severe reaction?

Difficulty breathing, throat swelling, loss of consciousness — call 999 immediately and use an EpiPen if available.

FoodGuard is an informational tool only and does not provide medical advice. If you or a family member is experiencing an allergic reaction, please call emergency services immediately.

Terms and Conditions
Last updated: June 2026

1. Informational Use Only

FoodGuard is an informational tool designed to assist users in identifying potential allergens in food products. FoodGuard is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis or treatment.

Results should never be used as the sole basis for decisions regarding food safety, particularly for individuals with severe allergies. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice.

2. No Guarantee of Accuracy

While FoodGuard uses advanced AI technology to read and analyse food labels, we cannot guarantee 100% accuracy. Always read food labels yourself, especially if you or a family member has a severe or life-threatening allergy.

3. Limitation of Liability

FoodGuard and its creators accept no liability for any harm, injury or allergic reaction that may occur as a result of relying on information provided by the app. Use of FoodGuard is entirely at your own risk.

4. Subscription and Payments

FoodGuard offers free and paid subscription plans. Paid subscriptions are billed monthly. You may cancel at any time.

5. Contact

For any questions about these terms, please contact us via the Contact page within the app.

Privacy Policy
Last updated: June 2026

1. What We Collect

FoodGuard collects your name, email address, and the family member profiles you create including names, ages, allergies and health conditions. Photos sent for scanning are not stored permanently.

2. How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to provide the FoodGuard service. We do not sell your data to third parties and we do not use it for advertising purposes.

3. Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your personal data. Your account is protected by your password.

4. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us via the Contact page to request deletion of your account and data.

Please remember that FoodGuard is an informational tool only and cannot provide medical advice. If you or a family member is experiencing an allergic reaction, please call emergency services immediately.
